message:
fix(lib,storage): emit null for skipped DB counts and add LazyFrankenDb Drop impl

src/lib.rs:
- Add state_db_count_json() helper that returns JSON null instead of 0
  when counts_skipped is true, preventing misleading "0 conversations"
  in robot/state output when the database was too large to scan. Applied
  to both state_meta_json and run_status conversation/message counts.

src/storage/sqlite.rs:
- Add Drop impl for LazyFrankenDb that calls close_best_effort_in_place()
  on the inner connection, ensuring WAL checkpoints and file handles are
  cleaned up when the lazy DB wrapper goes out of scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
